comments.author: tau-backlog
comments.text: Redesigned memory limits from misleading per-entry caps to per-scope total caps summing to 4096 chars: project 1408, global 1152, user 1536. CuratedMemory now enforces the total serialized scope size (including delimiters) on add/update, reports usagePercent from total scope chars instead of longest entry, and updates the tool description/error text to match. Added TDD coverage for cumulative-limit rejection, total-usage percentage, updated snapshot limit metadata, and renderer expectations. Verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau/.
